title: Piquant Crisp Ukrainian Plum Skewers
description: A sour and crisp Ukrainian dish featuring amaretti and sugar-free friendly ingredients, perfect for a festive snack
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Thread the sashimi-cut plums onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, mix together the crushed amaretti cookies, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the mixture onto the plum skewers, making sure they are evenly coated.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley and crumbled feta cheese.
Serve the skewers warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Let the skewers cool completely on a wire rack before serving.
